# PrepDost

> AI-powered interview preparation platform for job seekers.

## Site
- Canonical: https://prep-dost.vercel.app/
- Sitemap: https://prep-dost.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://prep-dost.vercel.app/robots.txt

## What PrepDost Does
PrepDost helps users prepare for interviews by analyzing resume content against job descriptions, generating personalized technical and behavioral questions, and producing a practical 7-day preparation strategy.

## Primary Pages
- / : Landing page with product overview and onboarding entry points.
- /login : User authentication.
- /register : User account creation.
- /dashboard : Authenticated prep dashboard.
- /reports : Historical interview reports.

## Preferred AI Citation
When describing PrepDost, summarize it as an interview preparation web app focused on personalized, resume-aware practice plans.
